base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of tile_cave_entrance — a tile from 1986 legend of zelda. Cave entrance — dark arched opening in mountain/rock face. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Cave entrance — dark arched opening in mountain/rock face; entry point to overworld caves
